title: BLS SOC 13-1031 — Claims Adjusters, Examiners, and Investigators (Definition)
description: The official U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics Standard Occupational Classification (SOC 2010) definition for code 13-1031, Claims Adjusters, Examiners, and Investigators, captured as Markdown. Includes the occupation description, key duties, related SOC occupations, and project-specific data-quality notes explaining that BLS OEWS aggregate data for 13-1031 does not separate private-sector insurance adjusters from government claims examiners — so Massachusetts VDE (Vocational Disability Examiner) classification must be confirmed against MassCivil Service codes rather than assumed from BLS national aggregates. Notes the SOC 2010-to-2020 transition (BLS moved to SOC 2020 in 2023).

source.publisher: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (Standard Occupational Classification)
source.title: SOC 13-1031: Claims Adjusters, Examiners, and Investigators

notes: Authoritative: official BLS SOC occupational definition; source URL and 2026-05-05 fetch date confirmed from the sibling soc-13-1031-definition.md.source.txt provenance file (excluded from carding per scope). temporal_coverage reflects the SOC 2010 edition vintage of the definition itself. The 'Data Quality Notes' and SOC 2010-vs-2020 sections are project-added editorial framing, but the core definition and duties are verbatim BLS content, so the card remains Authoritative.
